seo.title: About Cedar Tutoring Academy
seo.description: Learn how Cedar Tutoring Academy helps Plano families with personalized tutoring, trusted teachers, and progress parents can see.

hero.eyebrow: Local tutoring with a personal mission
hero.heading: A Plano tutoring academy built around people, not just programs.
hero.subtitle: Cedar Tutoring Academy exists to make personalized education feel steady, encouraging, and genuinely effective for families who want more than one-size-fits-all support.

story.heading: Cedar started with a simple belief: students grow fastest when they feel known.
paragraphs: Cedar was founded to give local families an option that felt more personal than crowded tutoring chains and more structured than occasional homework help. From the beginning, the goal was to combine strong teaching with the kind of consistency parents can trust.

Today, Cedar serves students across core academics and test prep with small groups, clear plans, and thoughtful communication. Every recommendation starts with understanding the student in front of us, not forcing them into a generic package.
That local, relationship-first approach still shapes every session. We want students to leave feeling more capable, parents to feel more informed, and progress to feel visible week after week.
story.missionText: Help every student build confidence, close skill gaps, and grow with instruction that is personal enough to adapt and structured enough to produce real results.
values: Personalized plans that start with assessment, goals, and the student's pace
Warm, high-expectation teaching that builds confidence without lowering standards
Clear communication so parents always understand progress and next steps
Flexible support designed for real family schedules and long-term growth

stats.label: Years serving families
stats.detail: Built locally around long-term relationships and steady results.

stats.label: Students supported
stats.detail: From early reading to advanced high-school coursework and test prep.

stats.label: Subjects & prep tracks
stats.detail: Core academics, homework help, Arabic, and major college-readiness exams.

stats.label: Family satisfaction
stats.detail: Parents stay because communication, trust, and outcomes all matter here.

differentiators.heading: What makes Cedar feel different from typical tutoring options.
differentiators.subtitle: Families come to Cedar for results, but they stay because the experience feels calm, responsive, and deeply personal.

items.title: Small-group attention
items.description: Our low student-to-tutor ratio gives students more feedback, more encouragement, and more chances to ask questions in the moment.
bullets: Focused instruction instead of blending into a large group
Responsive pacing based on actual learning gaps

items.title: Relationships that build trust
items.description: We believe academic growth happens faster when students feel safe, supported, and genuinely understood by the adults teaching them.
bullets: Warm, encouraging tutors who still hold a high bar
Parent communication that feels proactive and practical

items.title: Progress parents can see
items.description: Cedar uses assessments, planning, and regular check-ins to make progress visible instead of vague.
bullets: Clear updates on wins, gaps, and next steps

items.title: A premium local experience
items.description: Everything from scheduling to session quality is designed to reduce family stress and make support feel worth the investment.
bullets: Programs spanning K–12 tutoring and test prep

teamSection.heading: Educators who bring warmth, expertise, and consistency to every session.
teamSection.subtitle: Cedar's team blends subject knowledge with patient teaching and parent-friendly communication. Here are a few of the people families get to know.

finalCta.heading: Want to see if Cedar is the right fit for your family?
finalCta.subtext: Book a free assessment and we'll learn where your child stands, what support would help most, and how Cedar can make the next steps feel clear.
